meaning: n.强壮的肌肉,膂力,腕力,腌制好的野猪肉
examples: He's got plenty of brains as well as brawn.
In this job you need brains as well as brawn.
His quick wits compensate for his lack of brawn.
But he looked largely comfortable throughout the day as Brawn appeared to exhibit their continuing strength.
"I am delighted to welcome Paddy to the team and to begin working together, " said Brawn.
